_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including standard operating procedures, runbooks, escalation matrices, and knowledge base articles.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-008 (RM, cosine: 0.399), AI-T-002 (AI, cosine: 0.377).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.428). Shared vocabulary: [documentation]. DCWF-only terms [apply, code, secure] vs WIDAI-only terms [articles, base, data, develop, escalation, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.871 (P=0.910, R=0.836). P exceeds R by 0.074 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (93.7%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Apply secure code documentation." and "Develop and maintain operational documentation for data systems, including stand". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.421 ≈ STS 0.428 (gap 0.007). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [documentation] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.8%. Shared tokens: [documentation]. DCWF-only: [apply, code, secure]. WIDAI-only: [articles, base, data, develop, escalation, knowledge].
